'''kadhazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylostroma|xylostroma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylostroma|xylostroma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kadhazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kædhæzhæth|kædhæzhæth]] || [[word:kædhæzhæj|kædhæzhæj]] || [[word:kædhæzhæsh|kædhæzhæsh]] || [[word:kædhæzhæ|kædhæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kadhadhazhath|kadhadhazhath]] || [[word:kadhadhazhaj|kadhadhazhaj]] || [[word:kadhadhazhash|kadhadhazhash]] || [[word:kadhadhazha|kadhadhazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kadhazhath|kadhazhath]] || [[word:kadhazhaj|kadhazhaj]] || [[word:kadhazhash|kadhazhash]] || [[word:kadhazha|kadhazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kadhafzhath|kadhafzhath]] || [[word:kadhafzhaj|kadhafzhaj]] || [[word:kadhafzhash|kadhafzhash]] || [[word:kadhafzhaf|kadhafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kadhazhatha|kadhazhatha]] || [[word:kadhazhaja|kadhazhaja]] || [[word:kadhazhasha|kadhazhasha]] || [[word:kadhazhaka|kadhazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kadhazhath|kadhazhath]] || [[word:kadhazhaj|kadhazhaj]] || [[word:kadhazhash|kadhazhash]] || [[word:kadhazha|kadhazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kadhazhathal|kadhazhathal]] || [[word:kadhazhajal|kadhazhajal]] || [[word:kadhazhashal|kadhazhashal]] || [[word:kadhazhakal|kadhazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kadhazhathatha|kadhazhathatha]] || [[word:kadhazhajaja|kadhazhajaja]] || [[word:kadhazhashasha|kadhazhashasha]] || [[word:kadhazhaka|kadhazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kadhazhathan|kadhazhathan]] || [[word:kadhazhajan|kadhazhajan]] || [[word:kadhazhashan|kadhazhashan]] || [[word:kadhazhakan|kadhazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kadhazhathaoro|kadhazhathaoro]] || [[word:kadhazhajaoro|kadhazhajaoro]] || [[word:kadhazhashaoro|kadhazhashaoro]] || [[word:kadhazhakaoro|kadhazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
